<!--
Don't adjust the shortcode or the table header in this file, only the markdown table contents
-->

## **Objectives Map**

::: {.details summary="Objectives map linking case study learning objectives to sections of the case study"}

| Learning objective concept           | You will practice this by ....                                | Section                |
| :----------------------------------- | :-------------------------------------------------------------|:-----------------------|
| Term related to a learning objective | Description of action or activity that will reinforce that LO | [Data Import](https://www.opencasestudies.org/ocs-template-quarto/#data-import) |
| Another term                         | Description of its activity                                   | [Data Wrangling](https://www.opencasestudies.org/ocs-template-quarto/#data-wrangling) |
| Another learning objective concept   | Another description of this one's activity                    | [Data Visualization](https://www.opencasestudies.org/ocs-template-quarto/#data-visualization) |

:::

***
